meta.periodization: A=Hypertrophy, B=Volume, C=Strength, D=Power, E=Powerbuilding, F=Metabolic
sources: Built With Science / Dr. Eric Trexler

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.note: Primary horizontal compound — do first when freshest

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.note: Upper chest + anterior delt — incline hits fibres flat misses

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.note: Primary vertical compound — front delt + upper chest overlap

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.note: Lateral delt isolation — the only way to widen shoulders

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Ext
exercises.note: Long head stretched position — 40% more growth than pushdowns (2023)

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdowns
exercises.note: Lateral head isolation — cable keeps tension at peak

coreCloseout.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
coreCloseout.note: Anti-extension — spine already loaded from pressing

coreCloseout.name: Dead Bug
coreCloseout.note: Opposite pattern to bench — stabilizes lumbar

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Press
exercises.note: Upper chest emphasis — fresh angle from flat bench

exercises.name: Cable Fly
exercises.note: Constant tension through full ROM — peak contraction flat bench misses

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.note: Rotation recruits all 3 delt heads — more complete than standard press

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Cable keeps tension at peak vs dumbbell which drops off

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Ext
exercises.note: Long head anchor — higher reps this block for volume

exercises.name: Dips
exercises.note: Bodyweight compound — tricep + lower chest, high metabolic cost

coreCloseout.name: Plank
coreCloseout.note: Isometric anti-extension — high volume push day closer

coreCloseout.name: Shoulder Taps
coreCloseout.note: Anti-rotation plank variation

variants.label: C
variants.repScheme: 4-6 reps, 80-85% 1RM — resensitizes muscles for next hypertrophy block

exercises.name: Overhead Press
exercises.note: Heaviest vertical press of the cycle

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench
exercises.note: Compound tricep + chest — heaviest tricep work

exercises.name: Decline Barbell Press
exercises.note: Lower pec + more load than incline — completes chest coverage

exercises.name: Skull Crushers
exercises.note: Long head strength in stretched position

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly
exercises.note: Isolation only — keeps shoulder health during heavy pressing block

coreCloseout.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
coreCloseout.note: Strength anti-extension — full control

coreCloseout.name: Side Plank
coreCloseout.note: Lateral stability — complements heavy pressing

variants.label: D
variants.repScheme: Mixed 6-10 reps, explosive and novel movements

exercises.name: KB Clean and Press
exercises.note: Athletic compound — hip drive to overhead, novel motor pattern

exercises.name: Dumbbell Floor Press
exercises.note: Eliminates shoulder stretch at bottom — novel stimulus vs bench

exercises.name: Pec Deck / Machine Fly
exercises.note: Constant tension machine isolation — safe to go heavy

exercises.name: Shrugs
exercises.note: Upper trap — posture + shoulder health support

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Ext
exercises.note: Long head anchor — heavier than B block

exercises.name: Tricep Kickbacks
exercises.note: Peak contraction at full extension — novel angle

coreCloseout.name: Mountain Climbers
coreCloseout.note: Dynamic anti-extension — keeps heart rate up post-press

coreCloseout.name: Dead Bug
coreCloseout.note: Controlled breathing — reset CNS after power work

variants.label: E
variants.repScheme: 5-8 reps on compounds, 8-12 on accessories — strength + size together

exercises.name: Bench Press
exercises.note: Heavier than hypertrophy block — builds both size and strength

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.note: Accessory volume after heavy main lift

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Isolation volume — maintains delt size during strength focus

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench
exercises.note: Compound tricep strength — pairs well with bench day

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Ext
exercises.note: Long head volume after compound strength work

coreCloseout.note: Anti-extension strength accessory

variants.label: F
variants.repScheme: 12-20 reps, shorter rest, circuit-style — max calorie burn + conditioning

exercises.name: Push-Ups
exercises.note: High rep bodyweight — keeps heart rate elevated

exercises.name: Dumbbell Floor Press
exercises.note: Light dumbbell, fast tempo — metabolic chest work

exercises.name: Lateral Raises
exercises.note: Light weight high rep — shoulder endurance + burn

exercises.name: Pike Push-Ups
exercises.note: Bodyweight vertical push — no rest needed between

exercises.name: Dips

exercises.name: Deadlift

exercises.name: Barbell Row

exercises.name: Pull-Ups

exercises.name: Face Pulls

variants.label: B
variants.repScheme: 10-15 reps, lighter load, higher total sets

exercises.note: Vertical pull — easier to feel lat vs pull-up for volume

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row

exercises.note: Pure lat isolation — elbows locked, no bicep involvement

exercises.note: Unilateral — fixes imbalances, greater ROM than barbell

exercises.name: Cable Curl

coreCloseout.name: Dead Bug
